description: Type family identifiers for typography tokens. Assigned via the `family` name-object field. Represents the script or display context of the typeface, not a specific font name.

values.label: Serif
values.description: Serif typeface family (e.g. Adobe Clean Serif)

values.label: CJK
values.description: CJK (Chinese, Japanese, Korean) script typeface family

values.label: Code
values.description: Monospace typeface family for code and technical content
